expectedChapters.title: 35: A Light by Which to See

notes: GraphicAudio Part 3 manifestation. The raw audio tags are coarse Chapter 1-7 file sections, so this key uses transcript-to-EPUB opener evidence for the logical book chapters instead of the container chapter tags.
evidence: book.epub contents page and spine place this audio span at chapter 28, interludes 4-6, and chapters 29-43.
transcript.json opener searches found distinctive EPUB opening text for interludes 4-6 and chapters 29-43.
raw-chapters.json generic Chapter 1-7 marks split through logical chapters and should not be used as expected logical chapter titles.
uncertainty: The first chapter 28 boundary is the least certain because repeated GraphicAudio branding precedes the first clear post-intro narrative text; later boundaries are backed by stronger EPUB opener matches.
